title: rodgersia pinnata var. pinnata
intro: Rodgersia pinnata var. pinnata, also known as the Yunnan rodgersia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rodgersia pinnata var. pinnata include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
